verses.text: Kanaan mi, Negeb gama teng Arad gam kumpipa in Atharim lam tawnin Israel mite hong paina thu a zak ciangin amah in Israel-te do-in, amaute kimkhat salin a man hi
Tua ciangin Israel-te in Topa' tungah kiciamna khat bawl uh a, “Ka khutsung uhah hih mite nong piak nak leh kote in amau' khuapite ka susiamang ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Topa in zong Israel-te' cihna mangin Kanaan mite a pia hi. Israel-te in amau leh a khuapite uh susiamang ahih ciangin tua mun pen Hormah kici hi.
Hor Mual panin amaute dingkhia-in Edom gam kiimah a pai dingin San Tuipi lamah pai uh a, lamkalah mite lungkia uh hi
Mite in Pasian leh Moses gensia uh a, “Bang hangin sehnel gamah a si dingin Egypt panin kote hong paikhiatpih to na hi hiam? An leh tui omlo a, bangmah a manlo hih an ka kih uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa in mite' lakah gul guphate khah a, tuate in mite tu-in Israel mi tampi a si hi

Moses kiangah mite hong pai-in, “ Topa leh nang hong gensia-in kampau kha ka hih manun ka khial uh hi. Kote' kiang panin gulte a lakkhiatna dingin Topa' tungah thum in,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin mite-a' dingin Moses in thumsak hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Gul gupha tawh a kibang sumngo gul khat bawl in la, khuam khat tungah khai in. Gul in a tuk mi peuhmah in tua gul a et ciangin hing ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses in sumngo gul khat bawl a, khuam khat tungah a khai hi. Gul in mi khatpeuh a tuk leh amah in tua sumngo gul enin hing pah hi.
Israel mite dingkhia uh a, Oboth munah giahphual sat uh hi
Oboth panin dingkhia uh a, nisuahna lam, Iyeabarim munah giahphual sat uh hi
Tua lai panin dingkhia uh a, Zered Kuam-ah giahphual sat uh hi

Tua lai panin dingkhia uh a, Amor mite' gamgi panin a hong kikhungsuk gamlaka om Arnon gun galkhatah giahphual sat uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Arnon gun pen Moab leh Amor mite' kikalah Moab-te' gamgi ahi hi
Tua ahih manin Topa' Gal Laibu sungah, “Sufa gama Vuahep khua, leh Arnon gun kuamte
leh Ar khua ciang ban sukin, Moab gamgi lamah a paisuk kuam” kici hi
Tua lai panin Beer munah pai uh hi. Tua mun pen Topa in Moses kiangah, “Mite kaikhawm in; amaute tui ka pia ding hi,” a cihna tuikhuk ahi hi
Tua ciangin Israel mite in hih la sa uh hi: “Tuikhuk aw, phul in! La kong sak ding uh hi
Kumpi ciangkhut leh amau' ciangkhutte tawh mite' uliante in a tawh, kumpi tate in a tawh tuikhuk aw,” a ci uh hi. Gamlak panin amaute Mattanah munah pai uh a
Mattanah panin Nahaliel, Nahaliel panin Bamoth
Bamoth panin sehnel gam a kimuhsuk theihna Pisgah mual kiang nai, Moab gamsunga kuam khatah tung uh hi.
Tua ciangin Israel-te in Amor kumpipa Sihon kiangah kamtaite sawl uh a

“Na gam hong kantansak in. Lo ahi a, leenggui lo-ah ahi zongin ka pial kei ding uh hi. Tuikhuk tuite kong neksak kei ding uh a, na gam ka khen' khit mateng uh Kumpipa' Lamlian tawnin ka pai ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin Sihon in Israel mite ama gam kantansaklo hi. Amah in a mite khempeuh kaikhawmin, Israel-te a do dingin gamlakah pai-in Jahaz mun tung a, Israel-te a do hi
Israel-te in namsau tawh amah leh a mite tampi thatin, Arnon gun panin Jabbok lui, Ammon mite kiang dong bek a gam laksak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Ammon mite' gamgi nawksuak zolo uh hi
Israel-te in a khuapite khempeuh la-in, Heshbon gam sunga Amor mite' khuapi khempeuh leh khuaneu khempeuhah a teng uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Heshbon pen, nidangin Moab kumpipa simin a khutsung panin Arnon gun ciangdong a gam khempeuh a laksak, Amor mite' kumpipa Sihon' khuapi ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin la a sa pawlte in, “Heshbon-ah hong pai un. Lamkik un la, Sihon' khuapi kipsak un
Heshbon panin mei piangkhia a, Sihon' khuapi panin meikuang piangkhia hi. Moab mite' khuapi Ar, Arnon mual sang a ukte kangtum hi
Moab! Gimna na ngah hi. Khemosh mite! Na mangthang uh hi. Amah in a tapate galtai-in, a tanute galmatin, Amor kumpipa Sihon-a' dingin hong bawl hi
Tua ahih ciangin amau' suanlekhakte Heshbon pan Dibon ciangdong si uh a, mei in Medeba ciangdong a bat mateng ka siasak uh hi,” ci-in sa uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Israel-te in Bashan Kumpi Og Zo

verses.text: Tua bangin Amor mite' gam sungah Israel-te teng uh hi
Moses in Jazer khua thu a kansim dingin mi a sawl hi. Amaute in a khuaneute la-in tua lai-a om Amor mite suankhia uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute kihei-in Bashan lamah paito uh hi. Bashan kumpipa Og leh a mite khempeuh Edrei-ah amaute a do dingin hong kuan uh hi

Ahih hangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Amah kihta kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah leh a mite khempeuh leh a leitang, nomau khutsungah kong pia khin hi. Heshbon-ah a teng Amor kumpipa Sihon na bawl bangun amah na bawl ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin khat beek a nungta a om nawnlo dingin amaute in amah leh a tapate leh a mite khempeuh that uh a, amaute in ama gam a luah uh hi.
